Roofing Services

Understand the different types of roofing work so you can find the right contractor for your project.

Roof Replacement

Find trusted roof replacement contractors near you. Compare reviews, ratings, and get quotes from verified roofers.

$5,500 - $12,000 (asphalt), $10,000 - $25,000 (metal) Learn more →

Roof Repair

Find experienced roof repair contractors near you. From leak fixes to shingle replacement, compare local roofers by reviews and ratings.

$300 - $1,500 (minor), $1,500 - $5,000 (major) Learn more →

Metal Roofing

Find metal roofing contractors and installers near you. Compare standing seam, corrugated, and steel roofing specialists.

$10,000 - $25,000 (standing seam), $7,500 - $15,000 (corrugated) Learn more →

Commercial Roofing

Find commercial roofing contractors for flat roofs, warehouses, retail, and office buildings. Compare specialists by reviews and experience.

$4 - $10/sq ft depending on system Learn more →

Flat Roofing

Find flat roofing specialists near you. TPO, EPDM, PVC, and modified bitumen contractors with reviews and ratings.

$4 - $10/sq ft installed Learn more →

Storm Damage Roofing

Find storm damage roofing contractors who work with insurance. Hail, wind, and hurricane damage specialists near you.

Varies - often covered by insurance (minus deductible) Learn more →

Roof Inspection

Find certified roof inspectors near you. Pre-purchase, maintenance, and insurance inspections from trusted professionals.

$150 - $400 for a standard home inspection Learn more →

TopRoofers

Helping homeowners find trusted roofing contractors. Real reviews, real ratings, real businesses.
